title: Kerala’s Rural Mobility Crisis Is Not About Roads – It Is About Access
description: Thuruth village in Aluva, is no longer an island. Five bridges now connect the village to the mainland, three of them motorable. Roads exist, vehicles move, and Aluva lies barely a few kilometres away. Yet for most residents, public transport […] The post Kerala’s Rural Mobility Crisis Is Not About Roads – It Is About Access appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
